channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Enfortumab vedotin plus pembrolizumab outperforms platinum-based chemotherapy for metastatic urothelial carcinoma
item.description: 1. For adults with metastatic urothelial carcinoma, enfortumab vedotin plus pembrolizumab was well-tolerated and...

item.title: Glucosamine linked to faster Alzheimer's progression in patients with mild cognitive impairment
item.description: 1. Researchers at the University of Florida found that glucosamine, a joint supplement used by millions of older Americans, is associated...

item.title: Perioperative vitamin C may not reduce bleeding in percutaneous renal biopsy patients
item.description: 1. Perioperative intravenous vitamin C for percutaneous renal biopsy may not lower the rate of bleeding complications. Evidence Rat...
